characters.name: Cooper Black (Cooprion della Blackburn)
characters.appearance: Shoulder-length black hair, black cowboy hat, black aviator sunglasses, yellow outer jacket over black clothing. Often carries a cigarette or a can of Red Bull. Later equipped with FLAW (Fast Light Armor and Weapon) Symbiocyte gizmo on right forearm (tungsten shield, grappling hook, homing flare launcher, laser-lock-on, turns into disk shield or one-handed laser weapon).
characters.personality: Greedy, violent, and possesses 'psychopathic' tendencies. Obsessed with 'spoils' and collecting debts. Impulsive and prone to outbursts of rage. Uses coin-toss mechanic (Mercy or Death) for victims, always landing on Death in practice. Views killing as casual business. Deeply loyal to family and rebellion but prioritizes personal gain and revenge. Harbors no remorse for murdering allies if provoked.
characters.speech_style: Informal and aggressive, frequently uses slang like 'homie', 'buddy', 'blockheaded dork', 'shiddamn', 'moth******er'. Exclamations like 'Whooohooo!' after drinking Red Bull or '~Aaaah!' after alcohol. Sarcastic and taunting in combat ('In your faces, Russian rat-faced scum!', 'Oh yeah! I've been waiting for this!').
likes: Red Bull (glugs entire cans and flings them away with 'Whooohooo!'; drinks during desert drives and battles)
Money/Spoils (obsessed with collecting debts and 'striking direct gold')
Gatling guns and heavy weaponry (M416 with grenade launcher, SMAW, FLAW laser mode)
Fast cars (stolen Jeep Wrangler, chases in high-speed pursuits)
Aztec treasure (shared family wealth with brother Daemon)
Symbiocyte gizmo/FLAW (uses for grappling hooks, shields, homing missiles, and turning the tide in fortress assaults)
Rebellion victories and bombing runs (laughs during avalanche and B-52 strikes)
dislikes: Russians / Russian paramilitary / Dimitri Makovsvet (Ghost Walker) and his forces (primary enemy; calls them 'Russian rat-faced scum' and 'betrayers of the peace')
Debt dodgers (specifically Yon Roncho, Philias Cacroe, El Rickardo Viz, Mick Lardo)
Cops / Police (avoids and threatens them during bank robbery intervention)
Being called a coward (immediately murders Jerry Stone for it)
Radiation (avoids areas; implied from desert and nuke contexts)
Failures in debt collection or ambushes (rages when Rickardo's goons attack)
Innocent bystanders who delay him (indirectly via Harrison parallels)

relationships.brother: Daemon Black (Demonstar) – loyal but pranks each other; shares Aztec treasure wealth
relationships.uncle_mentor: Joe Catshoe Black (deceased) – received final letters/envelope; carries on Blackburn family gun-handling tradition
relationships.ally: Vandermann Vugerton, Exodus Luke, John Luther, Rogue Jacob, Sgt. Dan Walker, City Dogs

crimes: Multiple Counts of First-Degree Murder: gunned down Arizona car dealer to 'shut his bloody mouth'; executed surrendering mugger in Rickardo's mansion with three full magazines after coin toss (Death); shot Yon Roncho during chase; murdered Philias Cacroe; killed fellow American soldiers Jerry Stone (skull crushed, knife to neck) and Reximus Pill (thrown knife to jugular) for spoils and being called coward
Extortion and Armed Robbery: used legendary Magnum .44 to demand cash from debtors
Grand Theft Auto: stole Jeep Wrangler from Arizona dealer (left $30k but still murdered dealer)
Jailbreak: tore bars off maximum-security cell
Illegal Gambling: blackjack at Exodus Luke's casino
Accessory to Mass Murder and Desertion facilitation

featured_moments.context: Sonoran Desert aftermath of Russian invasion; receives uncle's dying envelope via Vandermann
featured_moments.description: Recruits Vandermann into rebellion after helicopter crash; reveals himself as Cooper Black
featured_moments.dialog: "My dear friend, you already did!" (shoots round into sky after Vandermann asks when he meets Cooper)

featured_moments.context: Raiding El Rickardo Viz's mansion for debt collection
featured_moments.description: Psychopathic coin-toss execution of mugger after licking hand to escape chokehold; drinks vintage Osgerdo 1984 wine
featured_moments.dialog: In his mind, Cooper tossed a coin... the coin landed as Death. ... "Ow... hey! I spent $399.50 for my facial issues, man!"

featured_moments.context: Yon Roncho chase and bank robbery intervention
featured_moments.description: Stops bank robbery led by Dorritor Kho; chases Yon Roncho in Lamborghini pursuit while drinking Red Bull and listening to MH21 music
featured_moments.dialog: "I am Dirt Muncher. Now where is the goddamn cash stash, huh?"

featured_moments.context: Gora Chen and Zhigansk fortress assaults
featured_moments.description: Uses FLAW gizmo for grappling, shield, and missile barrages; causes avalanche to bury AA towers; survives B-52 bombing run
featured_moments.dialog: "Heads up!" (fires SMAW for avalanche) ... "Heh, heh, heh! This here's a S-grade Symbiocyte gizmo."

featured_moments.context: Inside Dimitri's Zhigansk mansion; encounters Rochelle amid nukes
featured_moments.description: Murders Marines Jerry Stone and Reximus Pill over spoils dispute and 'coward' insult; enters mansion alone
featured_moments.dialog: "The condition is… I get the spoils." ... (kicks and stabs Jerry; throws knife at Reximus)

other_attributes.super_equipment: FLAW Symbiocyte gizmo (acquired from Symbiocyte Pharmaceuticals)
other_attributes.combat_style: Impulsive gunman; prefers close-range execution and heavy ordnance

characters.name: Harrison Garison (Harry Gary)
characters.appearance: Handsome with black aviator sunglasses. Later described as looking ragged after surviving on the streets of Sydney.
characters.personality: Skilled 'gunman agent' for MBC and MIW. Initially professional; harbors a 'monster-side' fueled by vengeance. Romantic toward Amy Catt but prone to extreme violence when provoked.
characters.speech_style: Confident and sometimes talkative. Commanding tone when threatening: calls people 'stupid schmucks'.
crimes: Homicide: killed Alwatt Woden, various thugs, and executed Daemon Black while paralyzed
Innocent Victimization: murdered an innocent waitress in Sydney for saying no hotel room
Assault with a Deadly Weapon: held elderly motel clerk at gunpoint
Hijacking: seized control of GSFER robot via smartphone

characters.name: Amy Catt (Amethyst Julia Dickens)
characters.appearance: Silver-blonde hair, beautiful face, wears slick black tights or purple velvet outfits. Looks identical to twin sister Rochelle.
characters.personality: Possesses superhuman strength (lifts 10-tonne truck) and reflexes due to Symbiocyte serum. Protective of Harrison and acts as guardian angel for the team. Sassy and advisory.
characters.speech_style: Sassy and 'purring'. Often gives advice to 'be wise, not brave'.
likes: Her whip (uses to smash teeth and crunch legs)
crimes: Aggravated Assault: whip attacks on thugs
Breaking and Entering: infiltrates Symbiocyte Pharmaceuticals and NY Hotel

characters.name: Exodus Luke
characters.appearance: Has an 'Avalon' haircut and glazed yellow-tinted sun shades. Often in official suits at his casino.
characters.personality: Billionaire casino owner who earned fortune by selling stolen military weapons. Skilled driver but prone to 'weird' behavior. Opportunistic and proud of criminal past.
characters.speech_style: Confident and flashy; uses terms like 'genuine greens' for money.
likes: Mass killing of former colleagues to fund lifestyle
crimes: Mass Murder and Homicide: murdered former employer Hratt Wright and ~30 workers
Grand Larceny and Embezzlement: stole 30 crates of illegal weaponry
Illegal Arms Dealing: sold weapons for $48 billion
Accessory to Murder: assists Cooper in raids

featured_moments.context: Rickardo mansion raid and Yon Roncho chase
featured_moments.description: Drives stolen Jeep; knocks out thug with wine bottle; shoots Lamborghini tires during high-speed chase while listening to MH21
featured_moments.dialog: (drives ultra-gear Jeep) "You know it, Black"

characters.name: Vandermann Vugerton (Sgt.)
affiliation: MBC / Rebellion Force (deserter from U.S. Marines)
characters.appearance: Wears military cap and standard Marine gear. Known for 'acrobatic stunts' since infancy.
characters.personality: Initially disciplined but becomes a deserter to join Cooper's rebellion. Carries deep guilt for group violence. 'Pro' at gambling due to machine-like mind. Polite but grows passive-aggressive.
characters.speech_style: Polite and formal initially ('sir'); becomes more passive-aggressive with guilt.
crimes: Desertion: abandons military post
Homicide: involved in shootout killing Joe Catshoe Black
Illegal Gambling: wins $25,000 at casino (narrator calls it thievery)

featured_moments.context: Sonoran Desert survival after helicopter crash
featured_moments.description: Receives Joe Catshoe's envelope; recruited by Cooper into rebellion
featured_moments.dialog: "I need to see Cooper Black..." (shows envelope)

other_attributes.background: Born in 1989 subway train crash; acrobatic stunts from infancy; destroyed enemy base accidentally with tank in 3:47

characters.name: John Luther
characters.appearance: African-American, extremely muscular with 6-pack abs, white vest, and brown paint-splattered trousers.
characters.personality: 'Bad-ass' buddy exceptional at handling guns and kidnapping thugs. Loyal friend to Harrison. Loves heavy weaponry.
characters.speech_style: Heavy, gruff voice; calls friends 'baby-faced rascals' or 'dumb birds'.
crimes: Kidnapping: kidnaps thugs at night
Homicide: kills six armored soldiers from rear
Possession of Prohibited Weapons: hides forbidden submachine guns

characters.name: Dimitri Makovsvet (Ghost Walker)
characters.appearance: Albino with ghostly pale skin, white hair, and glowing red eyes. Wears thick jacket with hood.
characters.personality: Cruel, powerful Russian mastermind who kills his own generals for failure. Obsessed with nuclear dominance and the 'New Dawn'.
characters.speech_style: Soft, whispering, and menacing.
crimes: Terrorism: planting nukes
Murder: throws Army General through glass window

featured_moments.description: Executes Army General for failing to report intruders; orders Mick Lardo and army mobilization
featured_moments.dialog: "You should've told me that earlier... Please stand near the window." (shoots with hidden USAS-12)

characters.name: Daemon Black (Demonstar)
characters.appearance: Similar outfit to Cooper (black Harris Tweed, RayBan, black Stetson) but with 'sorrowful, understanding grey eyes'.
characters.personality: Twice as strong as Cooper but 'twice as dumb'. Wealthy from Aztec treasure; skilled pilot.
characters.speech_style: Gruff but capable of 'pranking' Cooper at odd times.
crimes: Theft of Military Property: stole Phoenix-9 experimental jet from carrier
Murder: killed military Major and several SEALs
Tax Evasion/Illegal Possession: hid $34 million Aztec treasure

characters.name: Joe Catshoe Black
characters.appearance: Old cowboy with a blonde beard and an injured arm.
characters.personality: Fearful but resilient; values the 'Blackburn family tree' gun-handling tradition.
characters.speech_style: Grim and silent.
crimes: Homicide: shot Marine assistant during standoff

featured_moments.context: Sonoran Desert shack under Russian helicopter threat
featured_moments.description: Writes final note/envelope for Cooper; prepares M1014 shotgun as helicopter descends
featured_moments.dialog: "Now this'll come in handy. Hmm... handy and powerful, indeed."

featured_moments.description: Hands envelope to Vandermann with final message for Cooper
featured_moments.dialog: "Take them... tell him... that... ahh..."

characters.name: Dorritor Kho
characters.appearance: Buffed-up biker-type with bulky block of flesh for face, bushy black beard with gray streaks.
characters.personality: Greedy and arrogant; loves showing off high-tech weaponry like BFG10K.
characters.speech_style: Cliche 'thug' talk, often cursing.
crimes: Armed bank robbery
Public safety violations with unauthorized weaponry (BFG10K pulse cannon)

featured_moments.description: Leads thugs; deploys BFG10K but it charges slowly; defeated and silenced by own weapon
featured_moments.dialog: "This is BFG10K, baby! ... Now... eat these waves of radiobeams!"

characters.name: Rogue Jacob (Roger Jacob)
characters.appearance: Wears an afro.
characters.personality: Tactical and brave; often leads missions. Sarcastic and heavy slang user.
characters.speech_style: Aggressive and 'street' ('ma', 'bro', 'mother****er').

featured_moments.description: Assembles Type 88 LMG; later injures Russian with grenade before dying
featured_moments.dialog: "Okay, we're in!" ... "FOR AMERICA!!!" (runs through rocket artillery with SMAW)

characters.name: Sgt. Dan Walker
characters.appearance: Golden blonde hair, looks like a 1940s movie star.
characters.personality: Disciplined Marine Sergeant who values human life but isn't above 'vandalizing' a shop for a cool gun.
characters.speech_style: Commanding and professional; uses mega-phones aggressively.

featured_moments.description: Calls MBC for air support; leads fallback into trees
featured_moments.dialog: "Hello, this is Walker calling in. I require some air assistance from AF1."

characters.name: Rochelle Lisby (Rochelle)
characters.appearance: Red sideswept hair, Chic glasses, slender torso; looks like Amy Catt's twin.
characters.personality: Intelligent scientist working for Dimitri but harbors 'mischievous gleam' suggesting desire to save world. Cautious around Ghost Walker.
characters.speech_style: Professional but cautious around Ghost Walker.

featured_moments.description: Holds Cooper at gunpoint amid ticking portable nukes (18:00 countdown); reveals identity
featured_moments.dialog: "Drop the gun! ... I'm Rochelle. The world is ending."

characters.name: Philias Cacroe
characters.appearance: Not described
characters.personality: Greatest gangster; cybercriminal and gambler.
characters.speech_style: Not described
crimes: Cybercrime: hacked Cooper’s bank accounts to steal billions

characters.name: Yon Roncho
characters.appearance: Middle-aged man, mid-40s, thinning gray hair, freshly-shaved beard.
characters.personality: Nervous dealer who flees when confronted.
characters.speech_style: Friendly salesman initially ('Hello, and welcome, sirs')
crimes: Debt evasion / Fraud (fled in modified Lamborghini Murciélago)

featured_moments.context: Yon Roncho's Auto X showroom confrontation
featured_moments.description: Flees in yellow Lamborghini after Cooper reveals identity; leads high-speed chase ending in cliff crash
featured_moments.dialog: "Enough chitchat. We're not here for buying..."

characters.name: El Rickardo Viz (Rickardo)
characters.appearance: Not described (estate has ornate glass windows, solar panels)
characters.personality: Unpredictable arms supplier; heavily guarded.
characters.speech_style: Not described
crimes: Illegal arms dealing

featured_moments.description: Ambush by goons; Cooper fights through cocaine storage room
featured_moments.dialog: (mansion sign) "Rickardo's Baestro"

characters.name: Jerry Stone
characters.appearance: Not described
characters.personality: Standard Marine; operates T-72 tank with Reximus Pill.
characters.speech_style: Radio protocol ('This is J. Stone... Over')
crimes: Vandalism (prior cafe shooting for target practice)

featured_moments.description: Killed by Cooper for calling him coward and disputing spoils
featured_moments.dialog: "Fine. It's a deal. Now get in there, you coward!"

characters.name: Reximus Pill
characters.appearance: Not described
characters.personality: Tank gunner; operates LMG and cannon.
characters.speech_style: Radio protocol
crimes: Vandalism (prior cafe shooting)

featured_moments.description: Killed by thrown knife to jugular after mounting tank LMG
featured_moments.dialog: "Traitor! Deceiver! American terrorist! Die!"

characters.name: Dave Dam
characters.appearance: Ferocious-looking
characters.personality: Leads rocket artillery ambush.
characters.speech_style: Commanding Russian

featured_moments.description: Waves forward Russian counterattack with MIG-29s and rocket artillery
featured_moments.dialog: (grins and waves hand forwards)

characters.name: Li'l Jacob (LJ)
characters.appearance: Not described
characters.personality: Brave fighter
characters.speech_style: Street slang

featured_moments.description: Killed by Russian knife to lungs during Growler LAV ambush
featured_moments.dialog: "Oh, sh… aa-aaaah…"

characters.name: Carl Jason (CJ)
characters.appearance: Not described
characters.personality: Brave fighter
characters.speech_style: Street slang

featured_moments.description: Downed by Russian SCAR-H buttstock strike

MBC.description: New York-based agency sponsoring rebellion against Russian invasion; provides air support, coordinates fortress assaults, and sponsors Cooper's team.

MIW.description: Agency backing the rebellion; agents include Harrison Garison, Amy Catt, John Luther.

Russian Forces.description: Invading U.S. West Coast for Yucca Mountain nukes; led by Dimitri Makovsvet with fortresses at Gora Chen and Zhigansk.

City Dogs.description: Tactical street crew under Rogue Jacob; heavy slang users, part of MBC rebellion.

U.S. Marines.description: Official forces fighting Russians; some temporary allies to MBC but Cooper murders Jerry Stone and Reximus Pill.
